purpose: Prevent agents and reviewers from conflating different datasets, arm implementations, metrics, claim boundaries, and historical versus current reporting priority when interpreting KG and Ontology v2 experiments.
mandatory_reporting_rule: For weekly reports, status summaries, and method recommendations, read CURRENT_RESULTS.md first and report the latest relevant ablation. Historical experiments remain valid only for their own tuple and must not be promoted as the current headline.
mandatory_interpretation_rule: An experiment result is identified by the tuple (artifact, dataset_kind, arm_id, implementation_semantics, metric, claim_boundary). Results from different tuples must not be substituted for one another.

supported_claims: Upstream candidate admission is the dominant measured improvement on this generated EXM benchmark.
The zero-training frozen profile is the current stable candidate-admission default for this benchmark.
The frozen profile preserves all measured no-match and permission-denied guards while passing 607 more cases than the weak-label MLP arm.
unsupported_claims: The result isolates ontology, type-compatibility, or coordination-frame semantics.
Canonical graph or ontology write readiness.

supported_claims: Within this fixed redacted 100-case challenge, coordination-frame v2 outperforms KG without ontology.
Within this challenge, the hybrid soft-gate plus v2-frame arm is the best measured arm.
Within this challenge, the current hard ontology gate regresses below KG without ontology.
unsupported_claims: Canonical graph or ontology write readiness.

arms.interpretation_rule: Not measured is not a negative result.
Not measured is not a negative result.

supported_claims: Candidate KG improved this historical aggregate score from 11/100 to 19/100.
The measured ontology-guided KG arm did not improve beyond candidate KG on this historical full-PST experiment.
Coordination-frame v2 and hybrid soft-gate plus v2-frame were not executed in this artifact; their real-evidence transfer remains unverified.
All measured no-match cases failed while all permission-denied cases were enforced.
unsupported_claims: This is the current KG or ontology result.
This is the current weekly-report breakthrough.
The later candidate-admission ablations were not executed.
Coordination-frame v2 is ineffective on real PST evidence.
The ontology-guided KG arm is implementation-equivalent to the redacted challenge coordination_frame_v2 arm.
The full-PST result negates or supersedes the redacted hard-challenge v2 result.
An unexecuted Ontology v2 arm scored the same as candidate KG.

non_equivalence_rules: ontology_guided_kg must not be renamed or summarized as coordination_frame_v2 unless the report explicitly declares the same frame construction, slot semantics, scoring, and validation path.
A later experiment does not automatically supersede an earlier experiment when it uses a different dataset, arm implementation, output target, or metric.
A no-improvement result for a type-compatibility or ontology-guided arm does not prove that an unexecuted coordination-frame arm is ineffective.
A positive result on a designed redacted challenge proves only benchmark-scoped incremental value, not real-evidence transfer or production readiness.
Every report table that lists candidate_kg_fusion and ontology_guided_kg must also list coordination_frame_v2 and hybrid_soft_gate_v2_frame with an explicit measured or not-executed status.
The historical procurement 11/100 to 19/100 result must not be selected as the current headline when the 50,000-case candidate-admission ablation is relevant.

required_agent_summary.current_supported_statement: The latest candidate-admission ablation selects the zero-training frozen profile as the stable default: 43,976/50,000 total passes and 33,976/40,000 positive passes, with all no-match and permission-denied guards preserved. This is a candidate-admission and graph-construction result, not an isolated ontology or frame-semantic claim. Separately, coordination-frame v2 retains benchmark-scoped incremental value on the fixed redacted hard challenge.
required_agent_summary.historical_diagnostic_statement: The older procurement full-PST aggregate improved from 11/100 to 19/100 with Candidate KG, while its particular ontology-guided arm tied Candidate KG. Coordination-frame v2 and hybrid soft-gate plus v2-frame were not executed in that artifact, so their real-evidence transfer remains unverified rather than negative. This is historical diagnostic evidence and not the current method headline.
forbidden_unqualified_statements: Knowledge graph works but ontology does not.
Ontology v2 has not shown incremental value.
The full-PST experiment proves Ontology v2 is ineffective.
Ontology v2 tied candidate KG on full PST.
